EXPERIMENT.author: kamrify
EXPERIMENT.text_preview: published my claude code statusline https://t.co/8Vgt9QN2ZP
EXPERIMENT.one_liner: Customize your Claude Code statusline with relevant info by installing and configuring `claude-statusline` using `npx @kamranahmedse/claude-statusline`.
EXPERIMENT.reason: While we use Claude Code, a customizable statusline is a new addition that could enhance our workflow. It's worth experimenting with to see if it improves productivity.
relevance: Enhances Claude Code which we actively use as our primary interface.
EXPERIMENT.proposed_action: Try installing and configuring `claude-statusline` to see if it adds value to our current workflow.

EXPERIMENT.author: koylanai
EXPERIMENT.text_preview:
I've realized I don't use Hooks in Claude Code as often as I should. 

I put together a table of 18 practical hook ideas
EXPERIMENT.one_liner: Discover 18 practical Claude Code hook ideas for automating tasks and enhancing context management to improve Claude's performance.
EXPERIMENT.reason: We use pre-compact and session-end hooks for automatic wrap-up but this tweet suggests new hook use-cases (auto-formatting, quality gates). It's worth exploring these new uses.
relevance: Potentially improved use of existing pre-compact/session-end hooks.
Addresses issues of early stopping which we have seen.
EXPERIMENT.proposed_action: Review the 18 hook ideas and identify potential improvements to our current workflow.
